title: Bit Digital (BTBT) Analyst Ratings and Price Targets 2026
text: The overall analyst consensus for BTBT is bullish, with 5 Wall Street analysts rating it as Buy, 0 as Hold, and 0 as Sell, with a median price target of $5.00. HC Wainwright & Co. reiterated coverage of Bit Digital (BTBT) with a Buy recommendation on November 17, 2025. Additionally, B. Riley Securities maintained their buy rating for Bit Digital. There is no last downgrade for Bit Digital. Bit Digital currently has an average brokerage recommendation of 1.00 on a scale of 1 to 5 (Strong Buy to Strong Sell), calculated based on actual recommendations made by 5 brokerage firms. The average price target for Bit Digital is $6.10, with forecasts ranging from a low of $5.5 to a high of $7. The search results do not show any analyst downgrades for BTBT in 2026. All recent analyst actions have been either reiterations of buy ratings or maintained ratings, indicating a consistently bullish outlook from Wall Street analysts.
